summary.intent: Fix four review comments on PR #463 in the moltis repo related to HTML-to-text conversion in the web_fetch tool.
summary.outcome: All four review comments were addressed (silent error logging, usize::MAX width, error fallback with stripped HTML, link footnote suppression), tests pass, formatting verified, and changes committed.

repo: html2text crate: TrivialDecorator is the cleanest decorator — no brackets around links, no footnote URLs
html2text crate: include_link_footnotes defaults to false, so PlainDecorator adds [brackets] but not footnote URLs
html2text crate: config::plain_no_decorate() API exists for fully plain output
Web fetch HTML-to-text conversion lives in crates/tools/src/web_fetch.rs

code.finding: Silent errors in html_to_text should use tracing::warn! instead of being swallowed
Width parameter should use builder API or a large constant instead of usize::MAX
On conversion error, fall back to original HTML with tags stripped rather than dropping content
Use plain/no-decorate config to prevent link footnote URLs from being injected into output

workflow: Fetching both PR review comments and PR-level comments separately via GitHub API is needed to get the full picture
Checking crate source/docs for decorator behavior details (TrivialDecorator vs PlainDecorator) was necessary before choosing the fix
fmt check should be run before committing to avoid CI failures

friction: Needed multiple bash probes into the html2text crate internals to determine correct decorator behavior before being confident in the fix
ToolSearch and TaskOutput were invoked mid-session, suggesting a test run stalled or output needed to be polled
